theorem:  mergesort_correct
sample:   3
attempt:  fix_6

[proof]
intro l
by_cases h : l.length < 2
· have hm : mergesort l = l := by
    unfold mergesort
    rw [if_pos h]
  constructor
  · rw [hm]
    cases l with
    | nil =>
      exact Sorted.nil
    | cons x xs =>
      cases xs with
      | nil =>
        exact Sorted.singleton
      | cons y ys =>
        simp at h
        linarith
  · rw [hm]
    exact lemma_hint_0 l l (lemma_hint_15 l l)
· constructor
  · unfold mergesort
    rw [if_neg h]
    by_cases hs : Sorted (merge (mergesort (left l)) (mergesort (right l)))
    · exact hs
    · exfalso
      exact hs (by contradiction)
  · unfold mergesort
    rw [if_neg h]
    exact lemma_hint_0 (merge (mergesort (left l)) (mergesort (right l))) l rfl

[lean error]
location:
        · rw [hm]
          exact lemma_hint_0 l l (lemma_hint_15 l l)
                              ^
      · constructor
error: Application type mismatch: The last
  l
argument has type
  List T
but is expected to have type
  T
in the application
  lemma_hint_0 l l

location:
        · rw [hm]
          exact lemma_hint_0 l l (lemma_hint_15 l l)
                                                 ^
      · constructor
error: Application type mismatch: The last
  l
argument has type
  List T
but is expected to have type
  T
in the application
  lemma_hint_15 l l

location:
          · exfalso
            exact hs (by contradiction)
                        ^
        · unfold mergesort
error: Tactic `contradiction` failed
T : Type
inst✝² : Preorder T
inst✝¹ : DecidableEq T
inst✝ : DecidableRel LT.lt
l : List T
h : ¬l.length < 2
hs : ¬Sorted (merge (mergesort (left l)) (mergesort (right l)))
⊢ Sorted (merge (mergesort (left l)) (mergesort (right l)))

location:
          rw [if_neg h]
          exact lemma_hint_0 (merge (mergesort (left l)) (mergesort (right l))) l rfl
                                                                               ^
error: Application type mismatch: The argument
  l
has type
  List T
but is expected to have type
  T
in the application
  lemma_hint_0 (merge (mergesort (left l)) (mergesort (right l))) l
